growth_records.strain: MAG-based; M. wolfeii MAG 1.67 Mbp, 99.7% complete (no isolate); community from thermophilic trickle-bed biogas-upgrading reactor, DTU
growth_records.medium: Basal anaerobic (BA) medium + 0.2 g/L yeast extract

up.method: HPLC VFA (Shimadzu Nexera, Rezex ROA-Organic Acid H+, 65C); consumption monitored every 2 days
MicroGC headspace (community-level CO2 uptake modelled by ctFBA; increased under CO2 scarcity)

sec.method: MicroGC (TCD, Molsieve 5A + PoraPLOT U); CH4 significantly lower in Ac90/CO2 10 than CO2-rich conditions
ctFBA constraint-based model prediction (NOT measured); M. wolfeii released >0.2 mmol/gDW/h formate in Ac90/CO2 10

mfa.note: ctFBA model-predicted (gapseq/CoCo/MICOM ctFBA integrating metatranscriptomics), value is '>0.2'; elevated in Ac90/CO2 10; NOT an experimental measurement
model-predicted proportional to input gases; lowest in Ac90/CO2 10

community-level growth rates obtained by semi-log interpolation of OD600; Pearson r=0.55 (P=0.02) between measured and ctFBA-modelled growth across samples; numeric mu values reside in Supplementary Table 3 (not in fulltext)

growth_records.cite: Zampieri Guido et al. Core cooperative metabolism in low-complexity CO2-fixing anaerobic microbiota. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf017. [PMC11844248]
growth_records.snippet: where the former released over 0.2 mmol/gDW/h of formate ... Final optical density (OD) was proportional to H2 and CO2 amounts across conditions and CH4 production was found to be significantly lower in Ac90/CO2 10
growth_records.notes: Metagenome-scale community (not single isolate); genuine fed-batch experiment measured OD600, headspace gas (CH4,H2,CO2 by MicroGC), VFA/acetate (HPLC), and end-point biomass dry weight, but NO explicit numeric experimental uptake/secretion or growth-rate values appear in the fulltext (they are in Supplementary Table 3 / figures, not accessible here). The only numeric flux in text, formate >0.2 mmol/gDW/h, is ctFBA MODEL output, so is_experimental=false and confidence=low. Growth rate measured by semi-log OD600 interpolation but value not stated. pH not given. Condition Ac90/CO2 10.

growth_records.strain: MAG-based; no isolate; community from thermophilic trickle-bed biogas-upgrading reactor, DTU
growth_records.medium: Basal anaerobic (BA) medium + 0.2 g/L yeast extract

up.method: HPLC VFA, consumption monitored every 2 days

mfa.reaction_or_metabolite: community exchange fluxes (CO2, H2, CH4, acetate, formate)
mfa.note: ctFBA model-predicted per Fig 6B/Fig 7; transcriptome of Ac50/CO2 50 overlaps CO2 100; numeric values not tabulated in fulltext

growth_records.cite: Zampieri Guido et al. Core cooperative metabolism in low-complexity CO2-fixing anaerobic microbiota. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf017. [PMC11844248]
growth_records.snippet: (ii) 50% acetate and 50% CO2 (Ac50/CO2 50) ... The substrate volumes were set so as to provide the same C-equivalent moles in all the conditions. Hydrogen was fed in a 1:4 ratio with CO2.
growth_records.notes: Mixed-carbon fed-batch condition Ac50/CO2 50. Same measurements as Ac90/CO2 10 (OD600, MicroGC gas, HPLC VFA, biomass DW) but no explicit numeric experimental rates in fulltext; all quantitative fluxes are ctFBA model output. Record retained to capture the distinct experimental condition; confidence low.

growth_records.strain: MAG-based; M. wolfeii relative abundance 72.0-88.6%; no isolate
growth_records.medium: Basal anaerobic (BA) medium + 0.2 g/L yeast extract

up.method: MicroGC headspace; sole carbon source; M. wolfeii main CO2 utiliser, CO2 uptake highest here (model)

sec.method: MicroGC (TCD); highest CH4 production of the three conditions; released proportional to input gases

mfa.note: ctFBA model-predicted; increased vs Ac90/CO2 10; CO2-formate balance in Limnochordia sp. 5 shifts toward CO2
model-predicted proportional to input gases; highest in CO2 100

growth_records.cite: Zampieri Guido et al. Core cooperative metabolism in low-complexity CO2-fixing anaerobic microbiota. The ISME Journal (2025). DOI:10.1093/ismejo/wraf017. [PMC11844248]
growth_records.snippet: (iii) 100% CO2 (CO2 100) ... Final optical density (OD) was proportional to H2 and CO2 amounts across conditions ... M. wolfeii resulted to be the main CO2 utiliser, as expected, and released CH4 proportionally to the amount of input gases
growth_records.notes: Autotrophic hydrogenotrophic condition CO2 100 (pure CO2 + H2 1:4). Highest cell density/CH4. OD600, MicroGC gas, HPLC VFA, biomass DW measured but no numeric experimental rates in fulltext; quantitative fluxes are ctFBA model output. Community growth rate from semi-log OD600 interpolation (value in Supplementary Table 3, not accessible). Confidence low because no measured rate number is extractable from the fulltext.
